prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约12688名；2023-2024年数据仅含临床医学等高分专业（约866-966名），不具完整可比性；2025年改为物理类后，最低位次约9339名（ 护理学专业），为当前有效基准；2025年物理类计划42人，2026年计划41人，较上年减少1人，小幅缩招约2.4%，竞争略有加剧，位次数字有减小压力。 985、211、双一流，上海交通大学软科主榜全国第4名（2026年），医学院为交大王牌学院，临床医学A+、口腔医学A+，属国内医学顶尖梯队。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理及学术不端舆情；抖音热度排名第42（较热），整体曝光度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学A+、口腔医 学A+、护理学A-，与招生专业（临床医学本博连读、口腔方向、护理学等）高度匹配，学科实力对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业社会热度持续高位，临 床医学为长期热门方向；四川省2026年物理类考生估算约32.9万人，较2025年（28.5万）增加约15.5%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，属一线城市，对西南地区考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在四川招生计划相对稳定，跨省竞争格局变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次9339名、2026年计划小幅缩招（-1人）及本省物理类考生明显增加（+15.5%）三方面因素，竞争压力有所上升，位次数字有减小趋势；但声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般形 成一定缓冲。经综合权衡，预测2026年最低位次约9280名，区间8980-9580名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（本博连读八年制）
- 临床医学（本博连读口腔方向八年制）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（五年制）/医学试验班（临床方向）
- 临床医学（眼视光方向）
- 临床医学（五年制英语班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（含双学士学位项目）
- 护理学（护理英才试点班）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（8980-9580名）内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如9000名以内）可重点冲一档临床医学本博连读专业；位次在区间中后段建 议以二档临床医学五年制为主，三档护理学保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 12688; 2023-2024 data only includes high-score majors such as clinical medicine (approximately 866-966), not fully comparable; after switching to Physics Category in 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 9339 (Nursing major), serving as the current effective baseline; the 2025 Physics Category plan has 42 students, and the 2026 plan has 41 students, a decrease of 1 student from the previous year, a slight reduction of about 2.4%, intensifying competition slightly, with ranking numbers under downward pressure. 985, 211, Double First-Class, Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks 4th nationally on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), the School of Medicine is the flagship school of Jiao Tong University, with Clinical Medicine A+, Stomatology A+, belonging to the top tier of domestic medical schools.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management and academic misconduct public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), overall exposure is moderately high; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Clinical Medicine A+, Stomatology A+, Nursing A-, highly matching the enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine combined bachelor's and doctoral programs, Stomatology direction, Nursing, etc.), with strong subject strength attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of medical majors remains high, with Clinical Medicine being a long-term popular direction; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 329,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 2025 (285,000), with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying competition; Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwest region; the school's enrollment plan in Sichuan is relatively stable, with little change in cross-provincial competition patterns.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 9339, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-1 student), and the significant increase in local Physics Category candidates (+15.5%), competitive pressure has increased, with ranking numbers trending downward; however, the negative reputation and average Douyin popularity provide some buffer. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 9280, with a range of 8980-9580.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Combined Bachelor's and Doctoral Eight-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Combined Bachelor's and Doctoral Stomatology Direction Eight-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)/Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (Ophthalmology and Optometry Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year English Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nursing (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Nursing (Nursing Talent Pilot Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (8980-9580), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine combined bachelor's and doctoral programs; for rankings in the middle to back of the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine five-year programs, with Tier 3 Nursing as a safety.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
